creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Lapo Luchini from comment #4)
The patch is not in the quarterly branch for what I can see:

fernape@hammer:~/FreeBSD-repos/ports/sysutils/node_exporter$ git status
On branch 2023Q1
Your branch is up to date with 'freebsd/2023Q1'.

nothing to commit, working tree clean
fernape@hammer:~/FreeBSD-repos/ports/sysutils/node_exporter$ ls files/
node_exporter.in

But it is in main:

fernape@hammer:~/FreeBSD-repos/ports/sysutils/node_exporter$ git checkout main 
spdating files:  53% (11510/21716)6)16)
Updating files: 100% (21716/21716), done.
Switched to branch 'main'
Your branch is up to date with 'freebsd/main'.
fernape@hammer:~/FreeBSD-repos/ports/sysutils/node_exporter$ ls files
node_exporter.in                patch-collector_memory__bsd.go
